title: Vikram Vetal
subTitle: King Vikramaditya is told twenty-five stories by a ghost, Vetal. He must find a moral lesson in each of these stories.

title: Prithviraj Chauhan
subTitle: Prithviraj Chauhan, a great ruler, strives to overcome multiple challenges in order to defeat his enemies and ensure peace in his kingdom.

title: Satyamev Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. Furthermore, he begins his search and is taken aback upon learning who the killer is.

title: Rustom
subTitle: Rustom, a naval officer, shares a happy relationship with his wife Cynthia. Soon, he discovers her affair with Vikram, a close friend, and is accused of murdering him.

title: Bhaagamathie
subTitle: Chanchala, an IAS officer, is imprisoned in a haunted house for interrogation. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets possessed by a spirit.

title: Aparichit - The Stranger
subTitle: A meek lawyer, frustrated with his inability to change the system, develops a vigilante alter-ego to mete out justice to criminals. However, the police soon set out to track down the vigilante.

title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
subTitle: Pooja divorces her husband for being unfaithful and gets a job as secretary to a film star. The two fall in love, before her ex-husband returns and she finds herself confused between the two men.
Sathya, a young policeman, curses his luck when he gets posted in a control room. However, his life takes an unusual turn after the 100th call he overhears.

title: Flight
subTitle: Multimillionaire Ranveer Malhotra goes against all odds and takes on life-threatening obstacles in a bid to survive on an aeroplane after his manufacturing company deals with a massive fiasco.

title: Kakuda
subTitle: Sunny is a resident of Rathodi, a village haunted by a resentful spirit. When a small mistake causes Sunny to be cursed, he approaches a ghost hunter to find a solution.

title: Tees Maar Khan
subTitle: Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

title: Jigarwala No. 1
subTitle: The story revolves around Robin Hood, son of Kalyan, who unlike his father prefers comfort to kick. When Robin comes to India to start a hospital, he meets Chaitra and falls in love with her. He follows her to her village in Bihar to find his kick.

title: Big Dhamaka
subTitle: Two men look alike, with one of them being a successful businessman and the other trying to find work. Despite their differences, they end up falling for the same woman.

title: Don Aur Doctor
subTitle: The life of an honest doctor changes forever after an injured gangster, who is on the run, arrives at his clinic for treatment.

title: Go Goa Gone
subTitle: Things take a dangerous turn when the aftermath of a rave party causes three friends to get stranded on an isolated island infested with zombies.

title: Great Grand Masti
subTitle: Three friends travel to a small town where they meet Ragini, a gorgeous woman. However, their life changes as Ragini brings nothing but trouble to them.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: God Tussi Great Ho
subTitle: When an anchor, Arun, who is down on his luck, blames God for his misfortunes, God decides to give him his powers for ten days. Soon chaos ensues when Arun decides to grant everyone's wishes.

title: Tenali Ramakrishna
subTitle: Ramakrishna impresses King Krishnadevaraya with his wisdom and secures a position in his court. However, Tatacharya, the royal priest, plots against Ramakrishna to ban him from the court.

title: Mr. and Mrs. Ramachari
subTitle: A wayward young man who has a difficult relationship with his father goes off to college. He falls in love with a woman, but the pair soon begin to struggle with their relationship.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Jurmana
subTitle: A flambouyant businessman places a bet with his former college friend to woo their professor's young daughter. However, the bet leads to a series of unexpected consequences.
